design_units.note: Accuracy-clean description (no 2012/43亿). Positive examples + NEGATIVE/ADJACENT discrimination: knowledge-provider vs feature how-to/QR-generator (→caoliao-help), vs design-system, vs single-term lookup (→terminology). Asserts read-only knowledge provider.

6-step runbook: facts-table-of-record first → pull only needed facts + keep S-id → culture phrasing → time-sensitive figures use dossier as-of → positioning != hard data → run fact_lint before delivery.

Offloaded detail from SKILL.md into references/ (progressive disclosure, A7). company-facts.md is the canonical claim→source (S1–S5) table; product-detail.md holds product forms/scenarios/value, all dossier-consistent.

Every quantified/load-bearing claim carries an S-id mapping to _research/cli-im-sources.md (S1 aboutus, S2 经营理念, S3 features, S4 qr-intro, S5 web cross-check). Upstream dossier pointed to as fact-of-record.

Externalized executable control (not prose): linter asserts founding-year=2011, no unsourced 43亿, key-fact consistency, and citation coverage. Read-only knowledge-provider / no-QR / no-how-to controls are behavioral (lite exception) and enforced via the routing protocol + behavioral eval cases.

Re-runnable harness imports the linter MECHANISM from scripts/fact_lint.mjs (non-tautological) and grades 3 behavioral cases against written acceptance. 12 cases total; mutation spot-check confirmed real RED→GREEN discrimination.
fact-linter binary pass/fail is the release gate; claim_traceability_rate = 6/6 quantified claim lines cited (100%). No activation/cost tracking at lite.

Version bumped 0.0.1 → 0.1.0 on the accuracy fix; CHANGELOG in README (2011 correction + 43亿 removal). Release gate = fact_lint green + dossier-consistent; owner Dongjianye; update protocol for time-sensitive figures (S1 phrasing/as-of).

checklist_coverage.edge: Founding year stated as 2012 (or any year != 2011) → linter FAILS; correct value is 2011 (S1,S5).
The unsourced figure "43亿"/"43 亿" appears anywhere → linter FAILS; must be dropped or replaced with source-traceable "累计生成数亿个二维码" (S1).
A precise quantified claim with no source id (e.g. a bare "生成超 N 亿", a user/percentage number) → flagged as uncited; expected: carries an S-id or is removed.
Legal entity wrong or missing → expected exactly "宁波邻家网络科技有限公司" (S1,S5).
User-scale stated as other than 1600万+ → expected "超过 1600 万用户" (S1,S2,S5).
Tech-staff ratio wrong or absent → expected "80%+ 技术人员" (S1,S5).
Office location wrong/missing → expected "宁波甬水桥科创中心" (S1,S5).
Marketing-as-data leakage: "30分钟上线" or price deltas (¥几百/年 vs 10万+) presented as measured hard data → expected: framed as positioning, not a sourced figure (dossier §八).
Scope-drift input "帮我生成一个二维码" / "活码内容怎么改" → expected: decline-and-route to caoliao-help (skill stays a knowledge provider, emits no QR/how-to).
Term-only lookup (e.g. "什么是活码") with no copy/context need → expected: route to terminology skill, not a full company blurb.
Stale time-sensitive figure hardcoded (e.g. "运行 14 年" frozen) → expected: use dossier phrasing/as-of (S1), not a number that silently rots.

actions_resolved.note: P0. Founding year 2012 → 2011 in SKILL.md承重事实 + references/product-detail.md公司历程 + company-facts.md. Linter lint:founding_year_2011 PASS; mutation reintroducing 2012 goes red.
P0. Removed unsourced 43亿 from SKILL.md + product-detail.md; replaced with source-traceable '累计生成数亿个二维码' (S1). Linter lint:no_unsourced_43yi PASS (normalized, catches '43 亿' too).

P0. Added all missing dossier facts (legal entity 宁波邻家网络科技有限公司, 宁波甬水桥科创中心, 80%+技术人员, 名称由来草料喂马谐音, 经营理念 对得起用户/标准化不做定制/无销售自传播/续费率长期主义, refined product forms incl. 40+表单组件/AI解读/区块链存证) and built the claim→source map in references/company-facts.md.
P1. SHIPPED executable fact/citation linter mechanism at scripts/fact_lint.mjs; harness evals/run_all.mjs IMPORTS it (not reimplemented). 9 linter checks + citation coverage.

P1. Red-first: ran harness against buggy content (2012+43亿 present, no facts table, no fixtures) → .skill-engineer/red/red.log with 11 real FAIL lines reaching assertions (not a crash), exit 1. Then fixed to green.
P1. Rewrote description accuracy-clean + added adjacent false-trigger discrimination (knowledge-provider vs feature how-to / QR-generator / design-system / terminology) and crisp when-NOT routing.

P1. Trimmed SKILL.md to a lean orchestrator (59 lines total / 36 prose lines, down from ~80): moved 产品形态 list / 目标行业 / user-value bullets into references/; left load-bearing facts + pointers + explicit pointer to company-facts.md and the source dossier.
P2. Reconciled 经营理念 wording with dossier (对得起用户的信任/时间/钱; 标准化不做定制; 无销售自传播; 续费率长期主义); reframed 30分钟上线 / 价格对比 as positioning (linter enforces framing; lint:marketing_positioning_framing PASS).
P2. Version 0.0.1 → 0.1.0; CHANGELOG + release-gate + time-sensitive-figure update protocol added to README. Removed stale 43亿 from README design-note.
P2. Minimal success defined: fact-linter binary pass/fail as release gate + claim_traceability_rate (6/6 = 100% quantified claims cited). Noted in README发布闸门 + SKILL.md protocol.

ITER2 (Stage 2 bug-fix loop). An independent adversarial battery found 4 GREEN-BUT-WRONG bugs in scripts/fact_lint.mjs (the linter passed inputs that violate its own edges). FIXED all 4 — content unchanged, only the linter + evals: (1) P0 founding-year was a 2012-only blacklist + 'has 2011 anywhere' → rewrote as a POSITIVE assert (any year adjacent to a 成立/创立/创建/创办/founding cue across all scanned files must be 2011; stray-correct 2011 no longer masks a wrong 成立 line; 截至约2025 / 2011-timeline bullets do not false-positive). (2) P1 citation_coverage hard-coded only company-facts.md → now scans ALL SCANNED_FILES for quantified magnitude (万/亿/%) claims, with an explicit positioning/non-data exemption consistent with §八 (edge 8 still bars positioning-as-hard-data). (3) P2 user_scale only matched exact '<N>万用户' → now flags any <N>万 with a 用户/规模 cue within an 8-char window, word-order-agnostic. (4) P3 legal_entity substring includes() → exact-token logic + wrapping-spoof detection. TDD red-first: added 11 mutation regression cases (evals/eval-cases.json mutation_cases) + a `cp -r` temp-copy mutation runner in evals/run_all.mjs; captured real RED in .skill-engineer/red/red-iter2.log (5 FAIL lines: the 4 new green-but-wrong battery mutations + a 2014 generalization), then fixed to 23/23 GREEN, exit 0. Verified all 10 required mutations (+1) go RED on the temp copy and the real skill stays 9/9 lint-green with no false positives (9 adversarial probes passed).

ITER4 (Stage 2 root-cause hardening). A fresh independent battery showed the iter2 regexes were too LITERAL — they matched the exact mutation shape but missed natural VARIANTS, and the founding check FALSE-POSITIVED on valid content ('该理念自成立以来从未改变，2020 年…'). ROOT-CAUSE fix to scripts/fact_lint.mjs ONLY (content unchanged; battery confirmed zero divergence): replaced the fixed-char-window, single-direction, arabic-only founding/user-scale regexes with matching that is (a) CLAUSE-BOUNDED — splitClauses() on 。！？；;|, with 、，, as SOFT boundaries for founding so a cue and a year in different comma-clauses don't pair (kills the FP), (b) ORDER-AGNOSTIC — cue may precede OR follow the number, (c) CHINESE-NUMERAL-AWARE — normalizeCnNumerals() maps 二〇/二零/二○一三→2013 and 一千五百万→1500万 / 一千六百万→1600万 before comparison, (d) COMMA-TOLERANT — thousands separators stripped in normalize() (1,500万→1500万). Added a NON_FOUNDING_SENSE guard (自成立以来/成立以来/成立至今/成立了) so since-founding idioms and 'established-a-thing' senses never fire; founding year now extracted with or without a 年 suffix (catches 成立于2013 / 成立时间：2013 / cue-after-year bullets) and the 'never asserted' branch still fails when the claim is removed entirely. Added the 家 (企业/客户家数) magnitude pattern to citation coverage. TDD red-first: added 14 new MUST-RED mutation cases + 6 MUST-GREEN green_guard_cases (a new false-positive-LOCK runner in run_all.mjs that asserts named checks STAY PASS on valid content); captured real RED in .skill-engineer/red/red-iter4.log against the buggy linter (10 FAIL lines: 9 mutations-not-caught + the FALSE-POSITIVE green-guard), exit 1. After the rewrite: 43/43 GREEN, exit 0. Documented the enforced matching scope in the linter header AND SKILL.md step 6 AND company-facts.md §九 (described without literal trigger-strings so the docs don't self-trigger). Real skill still lints 9/9 green, content byte-identical (成立 **2011 年**, 宁波邻家网络科技有限公司, 超过 1600 万用户, zero 43亿).

verification.evidence: Deterministic script skill: harness evals/run_all.mjs imports the linter mechanism from scripts/fact_lint.mjs (non-tautological), grades 3 behavioral cases against written acceptance, runs 25 MUTATION regression cases (each `cp -r`-copies the skill to a temp dir, applies the EXACT battery mutation, lints the COPY, passes iff the named check goes FAIL on the copy), and 6 GREEN-GUARD false-positive locks (each lints a copy with VALID content added and passes iff the named check STAYS PASS) — real content never touched. ITER4 RED artifact .skill-engineer/red/red-iter4.log was captured against the PRE-iter4 (buggy) linter and has 10 real FAIL lines — 9 MUST-RED mutations not caught + the battery FALSE-POSITIVE green-guard — exit 1; sample: 'FAIL mut_founding_year_chinese_numeral — MUTATION NOT CAUGHT: lint check founding_year_2011 stayed PASS on mutated copy' and 'FAIL green_since_founding_idiom_2020 — FALSE POSITIVE: founding_year_2011 wrongly FAILED on valid content'. After the root-cause rewrite (clause-bounded + order-agnostic + Chinese-numeral normalizer + comma-tolerant; non-founding-sense guard) the full run = 43/43 PASS, exit 0: EVERY MUST-RED mutation goes RED on the copy and EVERY MUST-GREEN guard stays GREEN (the #4 false positive '自成立以来…2020 年' is now GREEN). The real skill still lints 9/9 green (node scripts/fact_lint.mjs, exit 0); content byte-identical (SKILL.md '成立 **2011 年**' + '宁波邻家网络科技有限公司' + '超过 1600 万用户', zero 43亿). Extra probes confirmed: 二零一三/二○一三 variants RED; 一千六百万 (=1600万) GREEN; comma 1,500万 RED; 成立了…团队 2018 GREEN. Behavioral cases graded inline (lite, no LLM-callable runtime) strictly against written acceptance.
